IBK TV — Privacy Policy

Effective date: March 29, 2026  |  Version: 2.0   Google Play Compliant

IBK TV ("we", "us", or "the Application") is a free live television streaming application available on Android TV, Fire TV, and the web. This Privacy Policy describes how we handle information in connection with your use of IBK TV. We are committed to protecting your privacy and being transparent about our practices.

1. Information We Collect

IBK TV does not collect, transmit, or store any personal information.

Specifically, IBK TV does not collect:

  • Names, email addresses, or any contact information
  • Device identifiers, advertising IDs, or hardware information
  • Location data (GPS, IP-based, or otherwise)
  • Usage analytics, crash reports, or behavioral data
  • Browsing history or search queries
  • Financial or payment information

No account, registration, or sign-in is required to use IBK TV.

2. Data Stored Locally on Your Device

IBK TV uses your device's local storage (localStorage / SharedPreferences) to save:

  • Your favorite channels
  • Recently watched channels
  • Your preferred category order

This data is stored exclusively on your device. It is never transmitted to our servers or any third party, and is deleted when you uninstall the application.

3. Internet Access and Streaming

IBK TV requires internet access to load and play live television streams. When you select a channel, your device may connect to:

  • IBK TV's proxy server (used to relay streams that require CORS handling)
  • Third-party broadcast servers operated by the respective broadcasters

IBK TV's proxy server does not log, store, or process any personal data. It functions solely as a technical relay to deliver video content to your device.

4. Third-Party Content and Services

IBK TV aggregates publicly available live television streams from independent broadcasters. We do not control the content, privacy practices, or data handling of those third-party streaming servers. We encourage you to review the privacy policies of the broadcasters whose content you access.

5. Permissions Used

  • INTERNET — Required to stream live television content.
  • ACCESS_NETWORK_STATE — Used to detect connectivity status and display an offline notice.

No other device permissions are requested or used.

6. Children's Privacy

IBK TV is intended for a general audience and is not directed at children under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect any personal information from children. If you believe a child has provided personal information through the app, please contact us and we will promptly address the matter.

7. Advertising

IBK TV does not display advertisements and does not integrate any advertising SDKs or third-party tracking libraries.

8. Data Security

Since IBK TV does not collect or transmit personal data, there is no personal data at risk. The application does not maintain user accounts, databases, or any backend storage of user information.

9. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be reflected by updating the "Effective date" at the top of this page. We encourage you to review this policy periodically. Continued use of the application after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

10. Contact Us

If you have any questions, concerns, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us at:

Email: keibk@protonmail.com

© 2026 IBK TV. All rights reserved.  |  Back to IBK TV
